flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Kettering College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.2k → $16.3k).

flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kettering College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.2k → $16.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kettering College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Kettering College rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 (38.2% → 55.0%).
